title: Vortex Client
description: A clientside modpack that focuses on a survival client with loads of tweaks and performance!
body:
# Vortex Client Modpack
Welcome to the Vortex Client Modpack for Minecraft 1.21! This modpack is meticulously curated to enhance your gameplay with a blend of performance, aesthetics, and utility improvements. Dive into a seamless and immersive Minecraft experience with the following standout features:

 # Performance Boosters

- **Sodium-Fabric**: Drastically improves frame rates and overall performance.
- **FerriteCore**: Reduces memory usage, helping to maintain a smooth gaming experience.
- **EntityCulling:** Improves rendering by culling entities not visible to the player.
 
 # Visual Enhancements

- Iris: Adds shader support, allowing for stunning visual effects.
- Blur: Adds a stylish blur effect to background GUIs.
- WaveyCapes: Bring your capes to life with dynamic, wave-like movements.
 
 # Quality of Life Improvements
 
- BetterPingDisplay: Displays your ping in the player list for better server performance awareness.
- MiniHUD: Provides a customizable HUD to display useful information.
- BetterThirdPerson: Enhances the third-person perspective with more flexibility and control.
  
 # User Interface Tweaks
 
- ModMenu: Easily manage your mods with an intuitive in-game menu.
- Cloth Config: A robust configuration library for mod settings.
- Smooth Scrolling: Refurbished smooth scrolling for all lists and menus.

 # Enhanced Gameplay Mechanics
 
- Litematica: Advanced schematic mod for planning and building.
- Tweakeroo: Offers various tweak options to enhance the building experience.
- WorldEdit: Powerful in-game map editor for extensive world alterations.

 # Chat and Communication

- VoiceChat-Fabric: In-game voice chat for seamless communication.
- Compact Chat: Keeps your chat clean and organized.
- Twitch Chat Reader: Integrate Twitch chat directly into your game.

 # Miscellaneous Additions

- JourneyMap: Real-time mapping in-game or in a web browser as you explore.
- ShulkerBoxTooltip: Displays the contents of Shulker Boxes without opening them.
- Peek: Allows peeking into containers and inventories without opening them.

 # Config and Customization

- Custom Client Brand: Personalize your client branding.
- Gamma Utils: Adjust gamma settings for better visibility.
- Searchables: Enhances search functionality for blocks and items.


Elevate your Minecraft experience with Vortex Client Modpack—tailored for the discerning player seeking both performance and flair. Download now and immerse yourself in a world of optimized and visually captivating adventures!

For the latest updates, support, and more information, visit our Modrinth page. Happy crafting!
